# Beyond Good and Evil

*[Nietzsche](../philosophers/nietzsche.md) · 1886*

Subtitled "Prelude to a Philosophy of the Future", it attacks the prejudices of philosophers, the belief in opposing values, and the will to truth. Nietzsche unfolds in it his perspectivism and the idea of the will to power.
